label: ON TRACK · weekly check-in call
framing: Phone call. Priya leads, Daniel is engaged and confident. Light-touch, surfaces a stretch goal.

lines.speaker: priya
lines.text: Hi Daniel, it's Priya. Just my Tuesday check-in, are you alright to talk for two minutes?

lines.speaker: daniel
lines.text: Yeah, fine. Just on my way back from the gym.

lines.speaker: priya
lines.text: Brilliant. Right, your numbers are properly strong. Top quartile in your cohort. CV is signed off, you've saved nine vacancies, and the Level 2 course is locked in for the first of July.

lines.speaker: daniel
lines.text: Yeah it's been alright, actually. I feel like I'm getting somewhere.

lines.speaker: priya
lines.text: I want to push you a little. Sundown Logistics is your match-of-the-week, but there's a Senior Warehouse Operative slot at Bow Distribution. Three grand more, same commute. Want me to send it across?

lines.speaker: daniel
lines.text: Senior, though? I haven't done senior before.

lines.speaker: priya
lines.text: You have, you just didn't call it that. Two years team-leading at Hackney was supervising six people. I'll pull it out on the CV and send you the link tonight.

lines.speaker: daniel
lines.text: Alright. Yeah, send it. Worst case I learn something at the interview.

lines.speaker: priya
lines.text: That's exactly the right attitude. Same time next Tuesday, and well done this week Daniel, properly well done.
